vacation.example: We are going to the beach for our vacation.
They vacationed in Japan last year.

valley.example: A river flows through the green valley.
valley.example_zh: 一條河流過綠色的山谷。

value.example: The value of the house has risen.

view.example: The view from the top is amazing.
view.example_zh: 從頂端看的景色很驚人。

view.example: In my view, the plan is good.

village.example: She grew up in a small village.

vote.example: Citizens vote to choose their leaders.

waist.example: The belt fits around my waist.
waist.example_zh: 這條腰帶剛好繞住我的腰。

waiter-waitress.example: The waiter brought us the menu.

wallet.example: He keeps cash in his wallet.

war.example: Many people suffered during the war.

waste.example: The factory dumps waste into the river.
waste.example_zh: 工廠把廢棄物倒進河裡。

watermelon.example: We ate cold watermelon in summer.
watermelon.example_zh: 我們在夏天吃冰涼的西瓜。

wedding.example: We were invited to their wedding.
wedding.example_zh: 我們受邀參加他們的婚禮。

weekday.example: She works on weekdays and rests on weekends.

weigh.example: Please weigh the fruit on the scale.

western.example: We watched a western last night.
western.example_zh: 我們昨晚看了一部西部片。

whale.example: The whale is the largest animal in the sea.
whale.example_zh: 鯨魚是海中最大的動物。

whatever.example: You can eat whatever you like.

wheel.example: One wheel of the bike is broken.
wheel.example_zh: 腳踏車的一個輪子壞了。

whenever.example: Call me whenever you need help.
whenever.example_zh: 你需要幫忙時隨時打給我。

wherever.example: I will follow you wherever you go.
wherever.example_zh: 無論你去哪我都跟著你。

whisper.example: She whispered a secret in my ear.
whisper.example_zh: 她在我耳邊低聲說了個秘密。

whoever.example: Whoever finishes first wins a prize.

whole.example: He ate the whole pizza by himself.
whole.example_zh: 他一個人吃掉整個披薩。

whole.example: The whole of the class agreed.

whom.example: The man whom you met is my uncle.
whom.example_zh: 你見過的那個人是我叔叔。

width.example: The width of the door is one meter.
width.example_zh: 這道門的寬度是一公尺。

wild.example: The crowd went wild at the concert.
wild.example_zh: 演唱會上群眾陷入瘋狂。

willing.example: She is willing to help anyone.

windy.example: It is too windy to fly a kite.
windy.example_zh: 風太大了，沒辦法放風箏。

wine.example: Adults drank wine at the dinner.
wine.example_zh: 大人在晚宴上喝葡萄酒。

wing.example: The plane's wing is very long.

wire.example: Birds sat on the telephone wire.

wolf.example: A wolf howled in the dark forest.
wolf.example_zh: 一隻狼在黑暗的森林裡嚎叫。

wonder.example: I wonder what time it is.
They looked at the waterfall in wonder.

wood.example: The table is made of wood.

wooden.example: She has a wooden toy box.
wooden.example_zh: 她有一個木製的玩具箱。

wool.example: The sweater is made of wool.

workbook.example: Do the exercises in your workbook.

worse.example_zh: 他的感冒一夜之間更嚴重了。

worse.example: She sings worse than I do.

worst.example: That was the worst movie I've ever seen.
worst.example_zh: 那是我看過最爛的電影。

worth.example: This old book is worth a lot of money.

wound.example: The nurse cleaned the wound carefully.
The soldier was wounded in battle.
wound.example_zh: 那名士兵在戰鬥中受傷。

yam.example: Yams are sweet and full of fiber.

youth.example: He was a fast runner in his youth.
The youth of today love technology.
youth.example_zh: 現在的年輕人熱愛科技。

zebra.example: A zebra has black and white stripes.
